subject: docs: fix stale useFocusTrap comment and update README hooks list
body:
InstallInstructionsModal had a comment saying "do NOT pass a ref as
first arg" — now misleading since useFocusTrap accepts an optional
externalRef second parameter. Updated to reflect the new API.

README hooks list was missing useDisclosureFocus (added this session).

Tags: documentation, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: burger-menu-completion
Semver: patch
